# AEGIS·AI

> AEGIS·AI is the unified AI Security Operations platform. It discovers every
> model, agent and prompt running in a business (sanctioned or shadow),
> governs non-human identities, correlates the AI kill chain into incidents,
> and runs continuous full-stack red teaming, all from one console.

Site: https://aegis.hesedemet.asia/
Vendor: Hesed & Emet Advisory Pte Ltd, Singapore. Phone +65 6829 2146.
Languages: English, Traditional Chinese, Simplified Chinese, Korean.

## AI Kinetics (physical / embodied AI)
AEGIS·AI extends security operations to embodied AI: robots, AMRs, drones,
manipulators and the vision-language-action (VLA) policies that drive
them. Scope includes adversarial physical patches, LiDAR spoofing and
phantom returns, GNSS spoofing and jamming, sensor blinding, VLA
instruction hijack, policy distribution shift, trajectory injection via
ROS 2 / DDS, e-stop / interlock bypass attempts, teleop and OTA channel
takeover, and digital-twin to real drift. Attacks are rehearsed in the
digital twin before any real cell is touched. Standards mapped (not
claimed): ISO 10218-1/-2, ISO/TS 15066, ISO 13849 / IEC 62061, ISO 21448
(SOTIF) and UL 4600. Sim-to-real evaluation against Isaac Sim, MuJoCo
Playground, Habitat 3.0 and RoboBench.

## Flagship: Agentic AI red team
AEGIS·AI's flagship capability is a continuous agentic AI red team that
attacks the whole agent loop on real targets, with safe execution
scaffolding: goal and instruction hijacking, tool misuse and excessive
agency, long-term memory poisoning, multi-agent collusion and A2A spoofing,
MCP tool poisoning and rug-pull, confused-deputy escalation, compositional
exfiltration, human-in-the-loop bypass, denial of wallet and runaway loops,
code-tool sandbox escape, plan and reasoning manipulation, and secret and
credential harvesting. It also delivers agentic runtime defence (tool-call
guardrails, just-in-time agent identity, memory and RAG integrity, full
trajectory replay, A2A authentication, spend caps, one-click quarantine) and
red-team depth beyond OWASP (multi-turn jailbreaks, gradient and
adversarial-suffix attacks, indirect injection, membership inference and
model and data extraction, guardrail evasion, supply-chain simulation),
mapped to MITRE ATLAS and NIST AI RMF.

## What it is
AEGIS·AI is a security operations platform purpose-built for AI systems
(LLMs, agents, MCP servers, RAG pipelines and the cloud infrastructure that
hosts them). It is SIEM-, cloud- and model-agnostic and is designed to sit on
top of the security stack an organisation already runs, not replace it.

## The eight layers
1. Asset and workforce-AI discovery (incl. shadow AI across productivity suites)
2. Supply chain and provenance (signed models, namespace-substitution defence)
3. Identity for AI (short-lived scoped non-human identities)
4. Open, OCSF-aligned telemetry data lake
5. Correlation and the AI kill chain
6. Investigation and one-click response
7. Model assurance (drift, bias, hallucination on in-house models)
8. Continuous full-stack red team (model, agents, MCP, identity, supply chain, cloud)

## Compliance
One-click, scored conformity audits with exportable reports for:
ISO/IEC 42001, the EU AI Act, NIST AI RMF, the Singapore IMDA Model AI
Governance Framework (incl. GenAI and AI Verify), MAS FEAT, and the OWASP LLM
and Agentic Top 10. Plus SEC disclosure, SOC 2, GDPR, HIPAA and PCI DSS
evidence packs.

## Who it is for
Security leadership (board-grade evidence), the SOC (AI incident
investigation), and ML and product teams (ship models without new exposure).

## Contact
Book a demo at https://aegis.hesedemet.asia/#demo
Parent company: https://www.hesedemet.asia
